title: Craft a Social Media Post
scenario: Write a social media post announcing a new limited-edition product, using a specific hashtag, and including a call-to-action to visit the company's website. The post should be engaging, visually appealing, and relevant to the target audience.
constraints: Must include a call-to-action to visit the company's website

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the post includes the specific hashtag.
Evaluate if the post includes a clear and actionable call-to-action.
Assess if the post is engaging, concise, and likely to generate interest from the target audience.
